meta.title: New Leads: Argentine Monopoly Actors 2025-2026
meta.description: Web research findings on recent developments involving market concentration, privatizations, mergers, and antitrust enforcement in Argentina
meta.methodology: Web search for 20 topic areas covering telecom, mining, privatization, agro, competition enforcement, and corporate consolidation

findings.headline: Telecom-Telefonica merger stalled in regulatory limbo after CNDC objection; would create 58% mobile market share

sources.title: La fusion entre Telecom y Telefonica sigue en un limbo regulatorio
Argentina prorroga intervencion del Enacom
CNDC Informe de objecion Telecom/Telefonica

findings.relevance: Critical monopoly formation. Acquisition announced Feb 2025 for USD 1.245B. CNDC objected June 2025: would eliminate one of three mobile operators, leaving duopoly (Telecom 58%, Claro 42%). Radio spectrum would exceed 140 MHz regulatory cap by up to 130 MHz. ENACOM intervention extended to Jan 2027 with no resolution. Telecom unifying all brands under single identity.

findings.headline: RIGI extended to July 2027 with 12 approved projects worth USD 26B+; lithium production jumped 66% in 2025

sources.title: El Gobierno aprobo otros dos proyectos mineros bajo el RIGI
RIGI revoluciona la mineria argentina - USD 47,000M en PDAC 2026
US Geological Survey: litio argentino salto 66% en 2025

findings.relevance: State capture vector. RIGI grants 30-year tax stability, customs exemptions, and free forex repatriation to mega-mining projects. Rio Tinto approved for USD 2.7B Rincon lithium project (53,000 TPA). Mining and energy concentrate 98% of RIGI investments. Seven lithium operations now active. Argentina produced 23,000 tonnes lithium in 2025 vs 13,800 in 2024.

new_entities.name: Rio Tinto
new_entities.role: RIGI-approved lithium investor, USD 2.7B Salar de Rincon

findings.headline: Aerolineas privatization paused; government sounding out LATAM, Avianca, Air France-KLM for 51% sale

sources.title: El oficialismo insiste con privatizar pero no es urgencia para 2026
Milei sondea entre grupos internacionales la privatizacion

findings.relevance: Key privatization target. In 2025 Aerolineas received zero Treasury subsidies for first time since renationalization and launched self-funded fleet expansion (18 new aircraft). Government exploring sale of 51% to LATAM Airlines, Avianca (Grupo Abra), or Air France-KLM consortium. Congress debate postponed to 2026.

findings.headline: Government selling 90% of AySA for ~USD 500M; bids launching March 2026, deadline April 2026

sources.title: El Gobierno apunta a este mes para lanzar pliegos de AySA
Milei avanza en privatizacion de AySA, se podra cortar agua por falta de pago
Gobierno avanza con privatizacion total de AYSA - 90% paquete accionario

findings.relevance: Water is a human right issue. Since nationalization in 2006, AySA received USD 13.4B in Treasury transfers. Government expects to raise only ~USD 500M (under 4% of those transfers). DNU 805/2025 authorized service cutoff for non-payment. 10% reserved for workers via Shared Property Program. Mekorot (Israeli water company) mentioned as potential interested party. Mixed sale: strategic operator + IPO.

new_entities.name: AySA (Agua y Saneamientos Argentinos)
new_entities.role: Privatization target, serves Buenos Aires metro

findings.headline: Three global dredging giants bid for 25-year, USD 10B Hidrovia concession; bids opened Feb 2026

sources.title: Tres gigantes del dragado buscan concesion por 25 anos
Claves de una licitacion estrategica - Infobae
Licitacion de la Hidrovia: apertura de sobres en marzo 2026

findings.relevance: Critical infrastructure monopoly. 80% of Argentine exports transit this waterway. Bidders: Jan De Nul NV (Belgian, former concession-holder), DEME (Belgian), DTA Engenharia (Brazilian). Previous 2024 tender voided after only one bid (DEME). Concession covers km 1238 of Rio Parana to Atlantic via Canal Punta Indio. Contract signature expected May 2026. Single operator will control toll and maintenance of Argentina's export jugular.

new_entities.name: ANPYN (Agencia Nacional de Puertos y Navegacion)

findings.headline: Grupo America shareholders buy Telefe for USD 95-104M from Paramount; media concentration deepens

sources.title: Un grupo de empresarios argentinos compra la totalidad de Telefe
Telefe vendida por mas de 100 millones a Manzano, Vila, Scaglione
Nuevos duenos: Scaglione cerro compra de Telefe con Manzano

findings.relevance: Major media concentration event. Buyers: Claudio Belocopitt, Daniel Vila, Jose Luis Manzano, Gustavo Scaglione. Same group already owns Grupo America (A24, Canal 2, La Red, etc.). Now also controls Canal 11 Buenos Aires, Canal 8 Cordoba, Canal 5 Rosario, Canal 13 Santa Fe, plus 3 Uruguayan channels and 10+ affiliates. Telefe leads all Argentine TV in ratings, share, and ad revenue. Produces 5,000+ hours of original content annually.

new_entities.name: Gustavo Scaglione
new_entities.role: Lead buyer of Telefe, Rosario businessman

new_entities.name: Claudio Belocopitt
new_entities.role: Telefe buyer, health insurance magnate (Swiss Medical)

findings.headline: Marcelo Mindlin acquires InterCement/Loma Negra through Brazilian bankruptcy process; gains 45% of Argentine cement market

sources.title: Mindlin a fondo: por que compro Loma Negra - El Cronista
Loma Negra controlada por consorcio de Mindlin - Infobae
Acreedores aprobaron plan para ingreso de Mindlin - La Nacion

findings.relevance: Cross-sector conglomerate expansion. Mindlin (Pampa Energia - energy) now enters cement/construction via bankruptcy arbitrage. Bought 60% of InterCement debt from Itau bank for ~USD 45M. Brazilian court approved restructuring with 99.99% creditor support. Latcem (Mindlin vehicle) + Redwood Capital + Moneda-Patria Investments become new controllers. Loma Negra holds 45% of Argentine cement market. InterCement also has 15% of Brazilian market. Mindlin now spans energy, gas, cement, construction materials.

new_entities.name: Latcem
new_entities.role: Mindlin acquisition vehicle for InterCement/Loma Negra

new_entities.name: InterCement
new_entities.role: Brazilian parent of Loma Negra, in restructuring

new_entities.name: Generacion Argentina S.A.
new_entities.role: Mindlin subsidiary that purchased Itau debt

findings.headline: Bunge completes USD 18B merger with Viterra in Argentina; controls 22% of agro exports and 25% of soy market

sources.title: Nacio un gigante del agro: Bunge cerro la fusion con Viterra - La Nacion
Bunge se quedo con el 25% del mercado de soja
Megafusion redefine el poder en puertos del Gran Rosario

findings.relevance: Dominant agro-export monopoly. China approved merger June 2025. Local integration completed Feb 2, 2026. Combined entity exported 23 million tonnes in 2025. Controls 61% of sunflower oil exports. 25% of soy market. Dominant position in Gran Rosario port complex (Argentina's main grain export corridor). Vladimir Barisic named Argentina Country Manager. This is the single largest concentration event in Argentine agricultural commodity trade.

new_entities.name: Vladimir Barisic
new_entities.role: Country Manager of merged Bunge Argentina

findings.headline: Autoridad Nacional de la Competencia replaces CNDC after 45 years; ex-ante merger control delayed to Nov 2026

sources.title: Nueva Autoridad Nacional de la Competencia
Main Developments in Competition Law 2025 - Argentina
Clemencia program launched

findings.relevance: Institutional transition creates enforcement gap. ANC began operations Nov 2025. Ex-ante merger control (mandatory pre-approval) will not take effect until Nov 2026 -- a full year gap. Only one known fine in 2025 (Henkel AG, ~USD 25,000 for late filing). Clemency program launched for cartel whistleblowers. 608 ongoing cases (334 concentration, 221 anticompetitive conduct, 53 market investigations). The year-long gap means major mergers (Bunge-Viterra, Telecom-Telefonica, Visa-Prisma) proceed without mandatory pre-notification.

findings.topic: Mercado Libre vs Banks Antitrust War
findings.headline: Cross-complaints between Mercado Libre and MODO/banks over payment monopoly; both filed with CNDC

sources.title: MODO denuncio a Mercado Libre por abuso de posicion dominante
Mercado Libre denuncia a 36 bancos por cartelizacion

findings.relevance: Payment ecosystem monopoly battle. MODO (bank consortium wallet) accused Mercado Libre of: refusing competing wallets in marketplace, forcing Mercado Pago exclusivity, blocking other payment processors. Mercado Libre counter-accused 36 banks of cartelization through MODO. Reveals structural concentration in Argentine digital payments. Ongoing at CNDC/ANC with 608 cases pending.

new_entities.name: MODO
new_entities.role: Bank consortium digital wallet, complainant vs Mercado Libre

findings.headline: Visa completes acquisition of Prisma and Newpay from Advent International; reconstructs the monopoly broken in 2017

sources.title: Visa Completes Acquisition of Prisma and Newpay
Fusion Visa-Prisma: gobierno festeja, mercado alerta monopolio
Visa compro Prisma - Infobae

findings.relevance: CRITICAL monopoly re-formation. In 2017 courts and CNDC forced banks to sell Prisma to break the Visa network-brand-processing monopoly. Now Visa has re-acquired Prisma (card issuer processing) AND Newpay (Banelco ATM network + PagoMisCuentas bill payment). Visa now again controls the brand AND the infrastructure. Completed Feb 27, 2026. Payway (merchant acquiring) remained with Advent, partially limiting vertical integration. Government supports the deal despite market alarm.

new_entities.name: Prisma Medios de Pago
new_entities.role: Card processing company re-acquired by Visa

new_entities.name: Newpay
new_entities.role: Banelco ATM network + PagoMisCuentas, acquired by Visa

findings.headline: Aluar's Futaleufú dam concession expired; transitional extension to June 2026; seven hydroelectric plants up for re-privatization

sources.title: Futuro de Futaleufú atrapado entre gobierno y holding Madanes Quintanilla
Prorrogan hasta junio 2026 periodo de transicion Futaleufú
Privatizacion de represas: gobierno licita cuatro centrales clave
Aluar adjudicado contrato de baterias en predio de FATE

findings.relevance: Energy-industrial monopoly nexus. Aluar (Madanes Quintanilla family) holds 60.2% of Hidroelectrica Futaleufú, controls 59% since 1995 privatization. Chubut province holds 33.51%. Concession expired after 30 years. Corte Suprema ruled in favor of Chubut governor Ignacio Torres on domain dispute. Meanwhile, government awarded Aluar a battery installation contract at the FATE factory site. Seven dams expiring Nov 2025 - Jul 2026: Futaleufú, Cabra Corral, El Tunal, Ullum, El Cadillal, Escaba, Pueblo Viejo.

new_entities.name: Ignacio Torres
new_entities.role: Governor of Chubut, won Supreme Court domain case

findings.headline: Cuadernos oral trial underway since Nov 2025; Cristina Kirchner + 86 co-defendants; testimony phase began March 2026

sources.title: Causa Cuadernos: comienza juicio - Fiscales.gob.ar
Cristina Kirchner declara en Comodoro Py
Cartelizacion de obra publica civil - acusacion CAEV

findings.relevance: Directly relevant to investigation. 87 defendants including CFK, 19 ex-officials, 64 businesspeople, 2 ex-drivers. Based on Oscar Centeno's notebooks documenting bribe collection routes 2005-2015. Corte Suprema cleared path Oct 2025 by rejecting defense appeals. Prosecution includes cartelization of public works by Camara Argentina de Empresas Viales (CAEV). Trial in virtual format; in-person for defendant statements. Questioning phase began March 2026.

new_entities.name: Camara Argentina de Empresas Viales (CAEV)
new_entities.role: Accused of cartelizing public road construction

new_entities.name: Oscar Centeno
new_entities.role: Key witness, driver who kept bribe notebooks

findings.headline: Supreme Court rejects Macri group appeal to remove judges; bankruptcy could extend to Socma and Sideco

sources.title: Causa Correo Argentino - Lijo no avanzo con expediente sensible
Corte Suprema reactivo causa y rechazo pedido del Grupo Macri
Acuerdo secreto con banco austriaco - OCCRP investigation

findings.relevance: Ongoing Macri group liability. Original debt: ~USD 296M from unpaid postal concession fees (1997-2003). Macri government attempted 98.82% debt reduction. Fiscal Gabriela Boquin opposes as 'abusive'. Judge Ariel Lijo has case but hasn't advanced. Supreme Court Dec 2025 decision could extend bankruptcy to holding companies Socma and Sideco. OCCRP investigation revealed secret agreement between Franco Macri and Austrian bank for debt management.

new_entities.name: Gabriela Boquin
new_entities.role: Fiscal opposing Correo debt reduction as abusive

new_entities.name: Ariel Lijo
new_entities.role: Federal Judge No. 4, handling Correo case (also Supreme Court nominee)

new_entities.name: Socma
new_entities.role: Macri family holding, could face bankruptcy extension

new_entities.name: Sideco
new_entities.role: Macri family holding, could face bankruptcy extension

findings.headline: Grupo Clarin returns to profitability in 2025; revenue up 61.8% to ARS 480.1B, 93.6% of debt in USD

sources.title: Grupo Clarin Q4 2025 Earnings Call
Grupo Clarin First Quarter 2025 Results

findings.relevance: Financial strength of dominant media group. Revenue grew 16% real (above inflation). Advertising represents ~70% of broadcasting revenues. Total debt decreased 13.8% to ARS 19.6B. 93.6% of debt denominated in USD. Return to profitability after 2024 losses. Strengthens Clarin's position as Argentina's most powerful media conglomerate.

findings.headline: OECD projects 5.2% growth for 2025; ex-ante merger control delayed to Nov 2026; competition enforcement nearly absent

sources.title: Argentina should maintain reform momentum - OECD
Main Developments in Competition Law 2025 - Argentina

findings.relevance: International validation of enforcement gap. Only one fine imposed in all of 2025 (~USD 25,000 to Henkel AG for late filing). No cartel or abuse-of-dominance sanctions. OECD notes Argentina's inflation fell from 211% to 47%. Growth forecast downgraded from 4.3% to 3% for 2026. The combination of rapid privatization, major mergers, and absent competition enforcement creates a window for monopoly formation.

findings.headline: ANC updated penalty unit to ARS 1,450.05; Bariloche nightclub cartel sanctioned ARS 240M; clemency program launched

sources.title: Sancion a discotecas de Bariloche por cartelizacion - ARS 240M
Desarrollos en Derecho de Competencia Argentina 2025

findings.relevance: Contrast between enforcement rhetoric and reality. The only significant sanction in 2025 was against Bariloche nightclubs (ARS 240M for price-fixing), while mega-mergers in telecom, agro, cement, and payments proceed with minimal scrutiny. Penalty unit increased from ARS 506 to ARS 1,450. Clemency program launched but no known applicants yet.

findings.headline: Techint sues state for USD 96M over unpaid gas contracts; lost Vaca Muerta pipeline bid to Indian company at 40% lower price

sources.title: Techint escala conflicto con Milei: juicio por USD 96M
Rocca defiende Techint y pide reglas claras para Vaca Muerta
Sturzenegger defiende contrato con empresa india
Techint y Pampa Energia juicios millonarios contra Estado por Plan Gas

findings.relevance: Rare state-corporate conflict. Tecpetrol (Techint subsidiary) sued ENARSA for ARS 134.2B (USD 96M) over unpaid gas minimum purchase obligations (2023-2025). Techint invested USD 5.4B over 2024-2026. Lost strategic Vaca Muerta pipeline bid after offering pipes 40% more expensive than Indian competitor. Minister Sturzenegger defended cheaper foreign option. Milei called Rocca and other industrialists 'chorros' and 'prebendarios'. Also: Pampa Energia (Mindlin) has parallel lawsuit against state for Plan Gas breaches.

new_entities.name: Tecpetrol
new_entities.role: Techint subsidiary, suing ENARSA for USD 96M

new_entities.name: ENARSA (Energia Argentina SA)
new_entities.role: Defendant in Techint gas contract lawsuit

new_entities.name: SESA
new_entities.role: Entity that awarded pipeline to Indian competitor

new_entities.name: Tenaris
new_entities.role: Techint tube subsidiary, lost pipeline bid

findings.headline: Insud Pharma acquires Viatris contraceptive business for USD 1.6B; becomes world's largest contraceptive manufacturer

sources.title: Fabricante del Viagra vende a Insud negocio clave - El Cronista
Insud se convierte en mayor fabricante de medicamento clave

findings.relevance: Pharmaceutical monopoly formation. Sigman (Argentina's 2nd richest, USD 6.3B fortune) acquired Viatris women's health business for USD 1.6B. Insud Pharma now has 7,000 employees in 50 countries, 18 production plants. Also signed agreements with Seqirus/PAHO for flu vaccine production and with Pfizer for pneumococcal vaccine supply to all Americas. mAbxience (biosimilar subsidiary) produces biologics. Sigman's empire spans pharma, biotech, vaccines, film production, agribusiness.

new_entities.name: Insud Pharma
new_entities.role: Sigman conglomerate, world's largest contraceptive maker

new_entities.name: Viatris
new_entities.role: Seller of women's health business to Insud

new_entities.name: Silvia Gold
new_entities.role: Co-owner of Insud with Hugo Sigman

findings.headline: Four Comahue hydroelectric plants privatized for USD 706M; seven more dams in transition

sources.title: Firman concesion de represas del Comahue por USD 706M
Avanza privatizacion represas del Comahue - La Nacion

findings.relevance: Energy infrastructure wave privatization. Four Comahue dams conceded for USD 706M. Seven additional plants (Futaleufú, Cabra Corral, El Tunal, Ullum, El Cadillal, Escaba, Pueblo Viejo) in transition with concessions expiring Nov 2025 - Jul 2026. This is the largest hydroelectric privatization wave since the 1990s Menem era. Follows same pattern: expiring concessions re-privatized without public debate on whether state should operate directly.

cross_cutting_themes.enforcement_vacuum: The transition from CNDC to ANC and the one-year delay of ex-ante merger control (until Nov 2026) creates a regulatory vacuum during which major monopoly-forming mergers proceed: Visa-Prisma, Bunge-Viterra, Telecom-Telefonica, and Mindlin-Loma Negra
cross_cutting_themes.privatization_wave: Largest since Menem 1990s: AySA (water), Aerolineas Argentinas (aviation), 11+ hydroelectric plants, Hidrovia (waterway), all proceeding simultaneously under Milei
cross_cutting_themes.conglomerate_consolidation: Mindlin now spans energy + cement. Vila-Manzano now control most of Argentine private TV. Bunge dominates grain exports. Visa re-monopolizes payments. Sigman builds global pharma empire.
cross_cutting_themes.state_corporate_tensions: Unusual Milei-Techint conflict over pipeline pricing. Milei publicly attacked industrialists as 'prebendarios'. Techint suing for USD 96M. Suggests fracture in traditional state-business accommodation.
cross_cutting_themes.foreign_capital_entry: RIGI regime attracting massive foreign mining investment (Rio Tinto USD 2.7B). Hidrovia bid by Belgian/Brazilian companies. Aerolineas courting LATAM/Avianca/Air France-KLM. Visa (US) acquiring payment infrastructure.

priority_leads_for_investigation.why: Courts forced divestiture in 2017; Visa now re-acquires the same assets with government blessing during ANC transition gap
Largest agro-export concentration event in Argentine history, completed Feb 2026

priority_leads_for_investigation.lead: AySA water privatization for USD 500M after USD 13.4B in state investment
priority_leads_for_investigation.why: Human rights dimension; water cutoff authorized; potential fire-sale pricing

priority_leads_for_investigation.lead: Hidrovia single-operator 25-year concession controlling 80% of exports
priority_leads_for_investigation.why: Strategic chokepoint; foreign operators; USD 10B contract
Same group now controls Grupo America + Telefe (top-rated network); unprecedented media concentration

priority_leads_for_investigation.lead: Mindlin cross-sector empire: Pampa Energia + Loma Negra cement via bankruptcy arbitrage
priority_leads_for_investigation.why: Bought USD 45M in distressed debt to control company with 45% cement market share

priority_leads_for_investigation.lead: Cuadernos trial: 64 businesspeople + CAEV cartel accusation
priority_leads_for_investigation.why: Direct evidence of public works cartelization; testimony phase just started

priority_leads_for_investigation.lead: ANC enforcement gap: one fine of USD 25K in entire year of 2025
priority_leads_for_investigation.why: De facto competition enforcement holiday during peak merger activity
